BOVIN-Pathway Demo · Database Inspector¶

结构：

  • §1 · 原始数据库载入与解释 — 七个数据库每个都做四件事： (a) 报告 shape / headers / 大小 · (b) head(10) 看前十行 · (c) 关联性分析 · (d) 分布（geographics + 整体）
  • §2 · 数据处理阶段 — 合并后的训练数据库信息

七个数据库：

§ 数据库 文件 预期形状
1.1 TCGA-COAD 表达矩阵 data/raw/HiSeqV2 329 × 20,530
1.2 TCGA-COAD 临床矩阵 data/raw/COAD_clinicalMatrix 329 × 132
1.3 TCGA-COAD 生存文件 data/raw/COAD_survival.txt 545 × 11
1.4 TCGA-LUAD 表达矩阵 data/raw_luad/HiSeqV2 576 × 20,530
1.5 TCGA-LUAD 临床矩阵 data/raw_luad/LUAD_clinicalMatrix 706 × 148
1.6 TCGA-LUAD 生存文件 data/raw_luad/LUAD_survival.txt 641 × 11
1.7 BOVIN-Pathway 图 bovin_demo/graph/bovin_pathway_v0.json 82 nodes / 99 edges

此 notebook 零外部依赖（除 numpy/pandas/matplotlib/seaborn/scipy）—— Google Colab / VS Code / Cursor / JupyterLab / DataSpell 都能直接跑。

In [1]:
# --- 0.1 Imports ---
from __future__ import annotations
import json, os
from pathlib import Path

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
from scipy.stats import chi2, pearsonr
from IPython.display import display, HTML

pd.set_option("display.max_columns", 50)
pd.set_option("display.width", 160)
sns.set_theme(style="whitegrid", context="notebook")
plt.rcParams["figure.dpi"] = 110
plt.rcParams["font.family"] = "DejaVu Sans"
In [2]:
# --- 0.2 Path detection (local / Colab) ---
def _find_repo_root() -> Path:
    here = Path.cwd().resolve()
    for p in [here, *here.parents]:
        if (p / "data" / "raw" / "HiSeqV2").exists() or (p / "data" / "raw" / "HiSeqV2.gz").exists():
            return p
    return here

ROOT = _find_repo_root()
RAW_COAD = ROOT / "data" / "raw"
RAW_LUAD = ROOT / "data" / "raw_luad"
GRAPH_JSON = ROOT / "bovin_demo" / "graph" / "bovin_pathway_v0.json"
if not GRAPH_JSON.exists():
    GRAPH_JSON = ROOT / "bovin_pathway_v0.json"

print(f"ROOT       = {ROOT}")
print(f"COAD raw   = {RAW_COAD}  exists={RAW_COAD.exists()}")
print(f"LUAD raw   = {RAW_LUAD}  exists={RAW_LUAD.exists()}")
print(f"graph json = {GRAPH_JSON}  exists={GRAPH_JSON.exists()}")

ROOT       = /sessions/brave-friendly-fermat/mnt/暂时项目/bovin-pathway-demo
COAD raw   = /sessions/brave-friendly-fermat/mnt/暂时项目/bovin-pathway-demo/data/raw  exists=True
LUAD raw   = /sessions/brave-friendly-fermat/mnt/暂时项目/bovin-pathway-demo/data/raw_luad  exists=True
graph json = /sessions/brave-friendly-fermat/mnt/暂时项目/bovin-pathway-demo/bovin_demo/graph/bovin_pathway_v0.json  exists=True
In [3]:
# --- 0.3 Common helpers used across every §1.x section ---
def file_size_kb(path: Path | str) -> str:
    sz = Path(path).stat().st_size
    return f"{sz/1024:.1f} KB" if sz < 1024*1024 else f"{sz/1024/1024:.2f} MB"

def df_memory_mb(df: pd.DataFrame) -> str:
    b = df.memory_usage(deep=True).sum()
    return f"{b/1024/1024:.2f} MB"

def anatomy(df: pd.DataFrame, filepath: Path, name: str,
            show_all_cols: bool = False, col_sample: int = 15):
    '''Standardized (a) report: shape / headers / size.

    *Every* column name is always emitted — never truncated — via an HTML
    <details> dropdown so the notebook stays readable while preserving
    the full column list for audit / verification.
    '''
    print(f"═══ {name} ═══")
    print(f"shape      : {df.shape[0]:,} rows  ×  {df.shape[1]:,} columns")
    print(f"file size  : {file_size_kb(filepath)}   on disk")
    print(f"memory     : {df_memory_mb(df)}   in pandas")
    print(f"dtypes     : {df.dtypes.value_counts().to_dict()}")

    # ── collapsible full-column dropdown ────────────────────────────────────
    cols = list(df.columns)
    items = "".join(
        f"<li style='padding:1px 6px;'><code>{str(c)}</code></li>"
        for c in cols
    )
    # Use `open` attribute if caller asked to show all, so the dropdown is
    # expanded by default for the small survival tables.
    open_attr = " open" if (show_all_cols and len(cols) <= 30) else ""
    html = f'''
<details{open_attr} style="margin:6px 0 10px 0; border:1px solid #e1e4e8;
                             border-radius:6px; padding:6px 10px; background:#fafbfc;">
  <summary style="cursor:pointer; font-weight:600; color:#24292e; user-select:none;">
    columns ({len(cols)}) — click to expand full list
  </summary>
  <ol style="column-count:3; column-gap:18px; -webkit-column-count:3;
             font-family: ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Consolas, monospace;
             font-size:11.5px; line-height:1.45; margin:8px 0 2px 20px;
             padding:0; color:#24292e;">
    {items}
  </ol>
</details>
'''
    display(HTML(html))

def overall_value_hist(values, title, ax=None, color="steelblue"):
    '''(d) 整体分布 for a flat numeric array.'''
    arr = np.asarray(values).ravel()
    arr = arr[~np.isnan(arr.astype(float))] if arr.dtype != object else arr
    if ax is None:
        fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(6, 3))
    ax.hist(arr, bins=60, color=color, edgecolor="white", linewidth=0.3)
    ax.set_title(title)
    ax.axvline(np.median(arr), color="crimson", lw=1, ls="--",
               label=f"median={np.median(arr):.2f}")
    ax.legend(loc="upper right", fontsize=9)
    return ax

§1 · 原始数据库载入与解释¶

下面七个小节结构完全一致：每个数据库 (a) shape/headers/大小 → (b) head(10) → (c) 关联性 → (d) 分布。

§1.1 · TCGA-COAD 表达矩阵 (HiSeqV2)¶

Xena 的 bulk RNA-seq 矩阵，数值是 log2(RSEM+1)。每一行是一个样本，每一列是一个基因。

In [4]:
# --- Load ---
def _load_expr(raw_dir: Path):
    p = raw_dir / ("HiSeqV2.gz" if (raw_dir / "HiSeqV2.gz").exists() else "HiSeqV2")
    df = pd.read_csv(p, sep="\t", index_col=0, low_memory=False)
    df.index.name = "gene"
    df = df.T                           # samples × genes
    df.index.name = "sample"
    df = df.loc[:, ~df.columns.duplicated(keep="first")]
    df = df.apply(pd.to_numeric, errors="coerce")
    return df, p

expr_c, expr_c_path = _load_expr(RAW_COAD)

(a) shape · headers · 大小¶

(b) head(10)¶

In [6]:
# 20,530 columns 显示不下——展示前 10 行 × 代表性 10 个基因
SIGNATURE = ["CALR", "HMGB1", "HSPA1A", "HSP90AA1", "CD47", "CD24"]
EXTRA     = ["CD8A", "PDCD1", "CD274", "IFNG"]
representative = [g for g in SIGNATURE + EXTRA if g in expr_c.columns]
expr_c[representative].head(10).round(3)

(c) 关联性 — 6 个 ICD 签名基因的两两 Pearson¶

In [7]:
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(5.2, 4))
corr = expr_c[SIGNATURE].corr()
sns.heatmap(corr, annot=True, fmt=".2f", cmap="RdBu_r", center=0,
            vmin=-1, vmax=1, ax=ax, annot_kws={"size": 10})
ax.set_title("COAD · 6-gene ICD signature · Pearson r")
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

(d) 分布¶

  • Geographics（样本级聚合）：把每一个样本看成一个"采样点"，看它的平均表达和方差
  • 整体分布：所有 (sample, gene) 值的 flat histogram
In [8]:
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(13.5, 3.3))

# (d.1) sample-mean boxplot — 是否有 outlier 样本？
per_sample_mean = expr_c.mean(axis=1)
axes[0].hist(per_sample_mean, bins=40, color="darkseagreen", edgecolor="white")
axes[0].axvline(per_sample_mean.median(), color="crimson", lw=1, ls="--")
axes[0].set_title(f"Geographics: 每个样本的均值\n(n={len(per_sample_mean)} samples)")
axes[0].set_xlabel("sample-mean log2 expr")

# (d.2) sample-std
per_sample_std = expr_c.std(axis=1)
axes[1].hist(per_sample_std, bins=40, color="khaki", edgecolor="white")
axes[1].axvline(per_sample_std.median(), color="crimson", lw=1, ls="--")
axes[1].set_title("Geographics: 每个样本的方差")
axes[1].set_xlabel("sample-std log2 expr")

# (d.3) 整体分布
overall_value_hist(expr_c.values, "整体分布: 所有 (sample × gene) 值", ax=axes[2])
axes[2].set_xlabel("log2(RSEM+1)")

plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

§1.2 · TCGA-COAD 临床矩阵¶

132 列宽表，混合类型（数值 + 分类 + 文本）。我们把所有列分成 10 类做字典化。

In [9]:
# --- Load ---
def _load_clinical(raw_dir: Path, cohort: str):
    matches = list(raw_dir.glob("*_clinicalMatrix"))
    assert matches, f"no *_clinicalMatrix under {raw_dir}"
    p = matches[0]
    df = pd.read_csv(p, sep="\t", index_col=0, low_memory=False)
    df.index.name = "sample"
    return df, p

clin_c, clin_c_path = _load_clinical(RAW_COAD, "COAD")

In [11]:
# --- 132 列的完整字典（10 类） ---
CLINICAL_DICT: dict[str, tuple[str, str]] = {
    # Xena metadata
    "_INTEGRATION": ("xena_meta", "Xena internal integration key"),
    "_PATIENT":     ("xena_meta", "TCGA patient barcode (first 12 chars of sample barcode)"),
    "_cohort":      ("xena_meta", "Cohort name on Xena, e.g. 'TCGA Colon Cancer'"),
    "_primary_disease": ("xena_meta", "Primary disease label"),
    "_primary_site":    ("xena_meta", "Primary anatomical site"),
    # Demographics
    "gender":       ("demographics", "MALE / FEMALE"),
    "days_to_birth": ("demographics", "Negative int — days from birth to index; abs/365.25 = age"),
    "age_at_initial_pathologic_diagnosis": ("demographics", "Age (years) at diagnosis"),
    "height":       ("demographics", "cm"),
    "weight":       ("demographics", "kg"),
    "number_of_first_degree_relatives_with_cancer_diagnosis":
        ("demographics", "Family cancer history count"),
    # AJCC staging
    "pathologic_stage":    ("staging", "AJCC stage I/II/III/IV (with subdivisions)"),
    "pathologic_T":        ("staging", "Primary tumor extent (T1–T4/TIS/TX)"),
    "pathologic_N":        ("staging", "Regional lymph nodes (N0–N2/NX)"),
    "pathologic_M":        ("staging", "Distant metastasis (M0/M1/MX)"),
    "histological_type":   ("staging", "e.g. Colon Adenocarcinoma / Mucinous"),
    "icd_10":              ("staging", "ICD-10 code"),
    "icd_o_3_histology":   ("staging", "ICD-O-3 morphology code"),
    "icd_o_3_site":        ("staging", "ICD-O-3 topography code"),
    "tumor_tissue_site":   ("staging", "Usually 'Colon'"),
    "anatomic_neoplasm_subdivision": ("staging", "Sigmoid / Cecum / Rectosigmoid / …"),
    # Tumor biology
    "MSI_updated_Oct62011": ("biology", "MSI — MSI-H / MSI-L / MSS"),
    "CIMP":                 ("biology", "CpG Island Methylator Phenotype"),
    "microsatellite_instability": ("biology", "Legacy MSI flag"),
    "hypermutation":        ("biology", "Hypermutated tumor flag"),
    "AWG_MLH1_silencing":   ("biology", "MLH1 promoter methylation"),
    "total_mutation":       ("biology", "Total somatic mutation count"),
    "non_silent_mutation":  ("biology", "Missense/nonsense count"),
    "silent_mutation":      ("biology", "Synonymous count"),
    "non_silent_rate_per_Mb": ("biology", "Non-silent burden per Mb"),
    "silent_rate_per_Mb":   ("biology", "Silent burden per Mb"),
    "braf_gene_analysis_performed": ("biology", "BRAF tested?"),
    "braf_gene_analysis_result":    ("biology", "BRAF V600E status"),
    "kras_gene_analysis_performed": ("biology", "KRAS tested?"),
    "kras_mutation_found":   ("biology", "KRAS mutation yes/no"),
    "kras_mutation_codon":   ("biology", "KRAS codon affected"),
    "loss_expression_of_mismatch_repair_proteins_by_ihc": ("biology", "MMR IHC performed"),
    "loss_expression_of_mismatch_repair_proteins_by_ihc_result": ("biology", "Which MMR protein lost"),
    "number_of_abnormal_loci": ("biology", "# loci showing MSI"),
    "number_of_loci_tested":   ("biology", "# loci in MSI panel"),
    # Nodal
    "lymphatic_invasion":        ("nodal", "YES/NO"),
    "venous_invasion":           ("nodal", "YES/NO"),
    "perineural_invasion_present": ("nodal", "YES/NO"),
    "lymph_node_examined_count": ("nodal", "# nodes examined"),
    "number_of_lymphnodes_positive_by_he":  ("nodal", "# positive by H&E"),
    "number_of_lymphnodes_positive_by_ihc": ("nodal", "# positive by IHC"),
    "primary_lymph_node_presentation_assessment": ("nodal", "Regional LN assessed?"),
    "non_nodal_tumor_deposits":  ("nodal", "Tumor deposits outside nodes"),
    "circumferential_resection_margin": ("nodal", "Margin distance"),
    # Outcome
    "vital_status":         ("outcome", "LIVING / DECEASED"),
    "days_to_death":        ("outcome", "Days index→death (null if alive)"),
    "days_to_last_followup": ("outcome", "Days index→last contact"),
    "person_neoplasm_cancer_status": ("outcome", "TUMOR FREE / WITH TUMOR"),
    "new_tumor_event_after_initial_treatment": ("outcome", "Recurrence since initial tx"),
    "new_neoplasm_event_type": ("outcome", "Locoregional / Distant / New Primary"),
    "new_tumor_event_additional_surgery_procedure": ("outcome", "Further surgery?"),
    "days_to_new_tumor_event_after_initial_treatment": ("outcome", "Days tx→recurrence"),
    "days_to_new_tumor_event_additional_surgery_procedure": ("outcome", "Days to add'l surgery"),
    "residual_disease_post_new_tumor_event_margin_status": ("outcome", "Margin after recurrence surgery"),
    "residual_tumor":       ("outcome", "R0/R1/R2/RX"),
    "followup_treatment_success": ("outcome", "Response to subsequent therapy"),
    "followup_case_report_form_submission_reason": ("outcome", "CRF trigger"),
    "lost_follow_up":       ("outcome", "YES/NO"),
    "primary_therapy_outcome_success": ("outcome", "Response to initial therapy"),
    "site_of_additional_surgery_new_tumor_event_mets": ("outcome", "Recurrence site"),
    # Treatment
    "history_of_neoadjuvant_treatment": ("treatment", "Neoadjuvant before sample"),
    "history_of_colon_polyps":  ("treatment", "Prior polyp history"),
    "colon_polyps_present":     ("treatment", "Polyps at diagnosis"),
    "additional_pharmaceutical_therapy": ("treatment", "Additional drug therapy"),
    "additional_radiation_therapy": ("treatment", "Additional radiation"),
    "radiation_therapy":        ("treatment", "Radiation administered"),
    "postoperative_rx_tx":      ("treatment", "Postop adjuvant therapy"),
    "preoperative_pretreatment_cea_level": ("treatment", "Pre-op CEA (ng/mL)"),
    "synchronous_colon_cancer_present": ("treatment", "Simultaneous cancer"),
    # Specimen
    "sample_type":    ("specimen", "Primary Tumor / Normal / Metastatic / Recurrent"),
    "sample_type_id": ("specimen", "01=PT, 06=Mets, 11=Normal"),
    "bcr_followup_barcode": ("specimen", "BCR follow-up barcode"),
    "bcr_patient_barcode":  ("specimen", "BCR patient barcode"),
    "bcr_sample_barcode":   ("specimen", "BCR sample barcode"),
    "vial_number":          ("specimen", "Tissue vial identifier"),
    "days_to_collection":   ("specimen", "Days to sample collection"),
    "days_to_initial_pathologic_diagnosis": ("specimen", "Usually 0 — anchor date"),
    "year_of_initial_pathologic_diagnosis": ("specimen", "Calendar year"),
    "tissue_source_site":   ("specimen", "2-char site code (e.g. 'AZ')"),
    "tissue_prospective_collection_indicator":  ("specimen", "YES/NO"),
    "tissue_retrospective_collection_indicator": ("specimen", "YES/NO"),
    "oct_embedded":         ("specimen", "OCT embedding flag"),
    "longest_dimension":    ("specimen", "Longest axis (cm)"),
    "shortest_dimension":   ("specimen", "Shortest axis (cm)"),
    "intermediate_dimension": ("specimen", "Middle axis (cm)"),
    "initial_weight":       ("specimen", "Specimen weight (mg)"),
    "pathology_report_file_name": ("specimen", "Path report filename"),
    "form_completion_date": ("specimen", "CRF completion date"),
    "informed_consent_verified": ("specimen", "Consent verification"),
    "is_ffpe":              ("specimen", "FFPE flag"),
    # Administrative
    "CDE_ID_3226963":       ("admin", "Common Data Element ID"),
    "AWG_cancer_type_Oct62011": ("admin", "AWG cancer type label"),
    "disease_code":         ("admin", "TCGA disease code"),
    "patient_id":           ("admin", "Patient ID short form"),
    "project_code":         ("admin", "TCGA project code"),
    "system_version":       ("admin", "CRF schema version"),
}

def _auto_cat(col):
    if col.startswith("_PANCAN_"):   return ("pancan", "Pan-cancer integrative cluster label")
    if col.startswith("_GENOMIC_ID_"): return ("xena_omics_flags", "Presence flag for an omics layer")
    return None

def annotate_columns(df, dict_):
    rows = []
    for c in df.columns:
        if c in dict_:
            cat, desc = dict_[c]
        else:
            a = _auto_cat(c)
            cat, desc = a if a else ("⚠ undocumented", "— (not in curated dict)")
        s = df[c]
        nu = s.nunique(dropna=True)
        ex = str(s.dropna().iloc[0]) if s.notna().any() else "—"
        if len(ex) > 40: ex = ex[:37] + "…"
        rows.append({"column": c, "category": cat, "description": desc,
                     "non_null_%": round(s.notna().mean()*100, 1),
                     "n_unique": int(nu), "example": ex})
    return pd.DataFrame(rows).set_index("column")

annot_c = annotate_columns(clin_c, CLINICAL_DICT)
print("Columns per category:")
print(annot_c["category"].value_counts().to_string())

Columns per category:
category
xena_omics_flags    23
specimen            21
biology             19
outcome             16
staging             10
treatment            9
nodal                9
pancan               8
admin                6
demographics         6
xena_meta            5

(d) 分布¶

  • Geographics：tissue_source_site（样本来自哪个 TCGA 站点）+ anatomic_neoplasm_subdivision（肿瘤在结肠哪一段）
  • 整体分布：所有关键字段的分布网格
In [16]:
# (d.1) Geographics
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(13.5, 3.5))
if "tissue_source_site" in clin_c.columns:
    vc = clin_c["tissue_source_site"].value_counts()
    axes[0].bar(vc.index, vc.values, color="steelblue")
    axes[0].set_title(f"tissue_source_site · {len(vc)} sites")
    axes[0].tick_params(axis="x", rotation=60, labelsize=8)
    axes[0].set_ylabel("# samples")
if "anatomic_neoplasm_subdivision" in clin_c.columns:
    vc = clin_c["anatomic_neoplasm_subdivision"].value_counts()
    axes[1].bar(vc.index, vc.values, color="teal")
    axes[1].set_title("anatomic_neoplasm_subdivision")
    axes[1].tick_params(axis="x", rotation=45, labelsize=9)
    axes[1].set_ylabel("# samples")
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()
In [17]:
# (d.2) 整体分布：9 格网格
fig, axes = plt.subplots(3, 3, figsize=(13.5, 9))
plots = [
    ("age_at_initial_pathologic_diagnosis", "hist", "Age at diagnosis"),
    ("gender", "bar", "Gender"),
    ("pathologic_stage", "bar", "AJCC stage"),
    ("pathologic_T", "bar", "T stage"),
    ("MSI_updated_Oct62011", "bar", "MSI status"),
    ("CIMP", "bar", "CIMP status"),
    ("vital_status", "bar", "Vital status"),
    ("lymphatic_invasion", "bar", "Lymphatic invasion"),
    ("total_mutation", "hist", "Total mutations"),
]
for ax, (col, kind, title) in zip(axes.ravel(), plots):
    if col not in clin_c.columns:
        ax.set_visible(False); continue
    if kind == "hist":
        vals = pd.to_numeric(clin_c[col], errors="coerce").dropna()
        ax.hist(vals, bins=30, color="steelblue", edgecolor="white")
    else:
        vc = clin_c[col].value_counts().head(8)
        ax.bar(range(len(vc)), vc.values, color="cadetblue")
        ax.set_xticks(range(len(vc)))
        ax.set_xticklabels(vc.index, rotation=35, ha="right", fontsize=8)
    ax.set_title(title, fontsize=10)
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

§1.3 · TCGA-COAD 生存文件¶

11 列——4 种生存终点（OS / DSS / DFI / PFI），每个终点一对 (event, time) 列。

终点 event 含义 适合的问题
OS 任何死亡 最终生存
DSS 仅癌症相关死亡 剔除非癌死亡干扰
DFI 仅曾 disease-free 的人的复发 手术根治队列
PFI 复发/进展/死亡 任一 随访较短时 power 最强 —— Peng Fig.1C 用的就是这个
In [18]:
# --- Load ---
def _load_survival(raw_dir: Path):
    matches = list(raw_dir.glob("*_survival.txt"))
    assert matches, f"no *_survival.txt under {raw_dir}"
    p = matches[0]
    df = pd.read_csv(p, sep="\t", low_memory=False)
    if "sample" in df.columns:
        df = df.set_index("sample")
    return df, p

surv_c, surv_c_path = _load_survival(RAW_COAD)

(c) 关联性 — 4 个 endpoint 的 event 列之间的一致性¶

In [21]:
event_cols = [c for c in ["OS", "DSS", "DFI", "PFI"] if c in surv_c.columns]
time_cols  = [f"{c}.time" for c in event_cols if f"{c}.time" in surv_c.columns]

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(11, 4))
sns.heatmap(surv_c[event_cols].astype(float).corr(), annot=True, fmt=".2f",
            cmap="RdBu_r", center=0, vmin=-1, vmax=1, ax=axes[0])
axes[0].set_title("event 列之间 Pearson")
sns.heatmap(surv_c[time_cols].corr(), annot=True, fmt=".2f",
            cmap="RdBu_r", center=0, vmin=-1, vmax=1, ax=axes[1])
axes[1].set_title("time 列之间 Pearson")
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

(d) 分布¶

生存文件没有地理信息——Geographics 字段在 §1.2 临床矩阵里。 这里只看整体分布：每个 endpoint 的 event 率 + time 分布。

In [22]:
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(13, 3.5))
# event rates
rates = []
for ep in event_cols:
    s = surv_c[ep].dropna()
    rates.append({"endpoint": ep, "n": len(s), "event_rate": float(s.mean())})
rdf = pd.DataFrame(rates)
axes[0].bar(rdf["endpoint"], rdf["event_rate"], color="#d14b4b")
for i, r in enumerate(rdf.itertuples()):
    axes[0].text(i, r.event_rate + 0.01, f"{r.event_rate:.2%}\n(n={r.n})",
                 ha="center", fontsize=9)
axes[0].set_ylim(0, max(rdf["event_rate"])*1.25 + 0.05)
axes[0].set_title("每个 endpoint 的 event rate")
axes[0].set_ylabel("event rate")

# time distributions
for col in time_cols:
    axes[1].hist(surv_c[col].dropna(), bins=40, alpha=0.45, label=col)
axes[1].legend(fontsize=9)
axes[1].set_title("time 分布 (days)")
axes[1].set_xlabel("days")
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

§1.4 · TCGA-LUAD 表达矩阵¶

LUAD（肺腺癌）是我们 M6 零样本迁移的目标队列。和 COAD 结构完全一致，只是病种不同。

In [23]:
expr_l, expr_l_path = _load_expr(RAW_LUAD)

(a) shape · headers · 大小¶

In [24]:
anatomy(expr_l, expr_l_path, "LUAD expression matrix", col_sample=10)

(b) head(10)¶

In [25]:
representative_l = [g for g in SIGNATURE + EXTRA if g in expr_l.columns]
expr_l[representative_l].head(10).round(3)
Out[25]:
gene CALR HMGB1 HSPA1A HSP90AA1 CD47 CD24 CD8A PDCD1 CD274 IFNG
sample

(c) 关联性 — 6 个 ICD 签名基因的两两 Pearson¶

In [26]:
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(5.2, 4))
sns.heatmap(expr_l[SIGNATURE].corr(), annot=True, fmt=".2f", cmap="RdBu_r",
            center=0, vmin=-1, vmax=1, ax=ax, annot_kws={"size": 10})
ax.set_title("LUAD · 6-gene ICD signature · Pearson r")
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

(d) 分布¶

In [27]:
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(13.5, 3.3))
per_sample_mean = expr_l.mean(axis=1)
axes[0].hist(per_sample_mean, bins=40, color="darkseagreen", edgecolor="white")
axes[0].axvline(per_sample_mean.median(), color="crimson", lw=1, ls="--")
axes[0].set_title(f"Geographics: 每个样本的均值 (n={len(per_sample_mean)})")
axes[0].set_xlabel("sample-mean log2 expr")
per_sample_std = expr_l.std(axis=1)
axes[1].hist(per_sample_std, bins=40, color="khaki", edgecolor="white")
axes[1].axvline(per_sample_std.median(), color="crimson", lw=1, ls="--")
axes[1].set_title("Geographics: 每个样本的方差")
axes[1].set_xlabel("sample-std log2 expr")
overall_value_hist(expr_l.values, "整体分布: 所有 (sample × gene) 值", ax=axes[2])
axes[2].set_xlabel("log2(RSEM+1)")
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

§1.5 · TCGA-LUAD 临床矩阵¶

LUAD 临床矩阵 148 列——比 COAD 多 16 列，这是 cohort 特异字段。字典里会标出哪些是 LUAD 新增。

In [28]:
clin_l, clin_l_path = _load_clinical(RAW_LUAD, "LUAD")

(a) shape · headers · 大小¶

In [29]:
anatomy(clin_l, clin_l_path, "LUAD clinical matrix", col_sample=10)
annot_l = annotate_columns(clin_l, CLINICAL_DICT)
print()
print("Columns per category:")
print(annot_l["category"].value_counts().to_string())

(c) 关联性 — 关键字段交叉表 + 数值 Pearson¶

In [31]:
if "pathologic_stage" in clin_l.columns:
    print("gender × AJCC stage:")
    print(pd.crosstab(clin_l["gender"], clin_l["pathologic_stage"], dropna=False, margins=True).to_string())
print()
print("gender × vital_status:")
print(pd.crosstab(clin_l["gender"], clin_l["vital_status"], dropna=False, margins=True).to_string())

In [32]:
num_l = [c for c in num_fields if c in clin_l.columns]
num_df_l = clin_l[num_l].apply(pd.to_numeric, errors="coerce")
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(7, 5.5))
sns.heatmap(num_df_l.corr(), annot=True, fmt=".2f", cmap="RdBu_r", center=0,
            vmin=-1, vmax=1, ax=ax, annot_kws={"size": 8})
ax.set_title("LUAD · 关键数值临床字段 Pearson")
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

(d) 分布¶

In [33]:
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(13.5, 3.5))
if "tissue_source_site" in clin_l.columns:
    vc = clin_l["tissue_source_site"].value_counts()
    axes[0].bar(vc.index, vc.values, color="steelblue")
    axes[0].set_title(f"tissue_source_site · {len(vc)} sites")
    axes[0].tick_params(axis="x", rotation=60, labelsize=7)
if "anatomic_neoplasm_subdivision" in clin_l.columns:
    vc = clin_l["anatomic_neoplasm_subdivision"].value_counts()
    axes[1].bar(range(len(vc)), vc.values, color="teal")
    axes[1].set_xticks(range(len(vc)))
    axes[1].set_xticklabels(vc.index, rotation=35, ha="right", fontsize=8)
    axes[1].set_title("anatomic_neoplasm_subdivision")
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()
In [34]:
fig, axes = plt.subplots(3, 3, figsize=(13.5, 9))
for ax, (col, kind, title) in zip(axes.ravel(), plots):
    if col not in clin_l.columns:
        ax.set_visible(False); continue
    if kind == "hist":
        vals = pd.to_numeric(clin_l[col], errors="coerce").dropna()
        ax.hist(vals, bins=30, color="#4a8fba", edgecolor="white")
    else:
        vc = clin_l[col].value_counts().head(8)
        ax.bar(range(len(vc)), vc.values, color="#71aab0")
        ax.set_xticks(range(len(vc)))
        ax.set_xticklabels(vc.index, rotation=35, ha="right", fontsize=8)
    ax.set_title(title, fontsize=10)
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(13, 3.5))
rates_l = []
for ep in event_cols_l:
    s = surv_l[ep].dropna()
    rates_l.append({"endpoint": ep, "n": len(s), "event_rate": float(s.mean())})
rdf_l = pd.DataFrame(rates_l)
axes[0].bar(rdf_l["endpoint"], rdf_l["event_rate"], color="#2f6fa1")
for i, r in enumerate(rdf_l.itertuples()):
    axes[0].text(i, r.event_rate + 0.01, f"{r.event_rate:.2%}\n(n={r.n})",
                 ha="center", fontsize=9)
axes[0].set_ylim(0, max(rdf_l["event_rate"])*1.25 + 0.05)
axes[0].set_title("LUAD · 每个 endpoint 的 event rate")
for col in time_cols_l:
    axes[1].hist(surv_l[col].dropna(), bins=40, alpha=0.45, label=col)
axes[1].legend(fontsize=9)
axes[1].set_title("LUAD · time 分布 (days)")

§1.7 · BOVIN-Pathway 图¶

这是一张自制的异质图（heterogeneous graph），把 BOVIN 论文的生物学因果链结构化成 82 节点 / 99 边。节点属性有 8 个字段，边属性有 7 个。

In [40]:
with open(GRAPH_JSON) as f:
    graph = json.load(f)
nodes = pd.DataFrame(graph["nodes"])
edges = pd.DataFrame(graph["edges"])

(a) shape · headers · 大小¶

In [41]:
print("═══ BOVIN-Pathway graph ═══")
print(f"file size   : {file_size_kb(GRAPH_JSON)}")
print(f"version     : {graph.get('version')}")
print(f"modules     : {len(graph.get('modules', []))}")
print(f"nodes       : {len(nodes):,} rows × {nodes.shape[1]} cols")
print(f"edges       : {len(edges):,} rows × {edges.shape[1]} cols")

# Full column lists in dropdowns — same UX as §1.1-§1.6
for label, frame in [("nodes", nodes), ("edges", edges)]:
    cols = list(frame.columns)
    items = "".join(
        f"<li style='padding:1px 6px;'><code>{c}</code></li>" for c in cols
    )
    display(HTML(f'''
<details open style="margin:4px 0 10px 0; border:1px solid #e1e4e8;
                     border-radius:6px; padding:6px 10px; background:#fafbfc;">
  <summary style="cursor:pointer; font-weight:600; color:#24292e; user-select:none;">
    {label} · columns ({len(cols)}) — click to expand full list
  </summary>
  <ol style="column-count:3; column-gap:18px;
             font-family: ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Consolas, monospace;
             font-size:11.5px; line-height:1.45;
             margin:8px 0 2px 20px; padding:0; color:#24292e;">
    {items}
  </ol>
</details>
'''))

═══ BOVIN-Pathway graph ═══
file size   : 39.6 KB
version     : v0.1
modules     : 11
nodes       : 82 rows × 8 cols
edges       : 99 rows × 7 cols

  2. symbol
  3. name
  4. type
  5. side

edges · columns (7) — click to expand full list
  1. source
  2. relation
  3. target
  4. direction

  6. module_to

── edges.head(10) ──
     source     relation    target direction module_from module_to                              evidence
0       wsn     presents        ha         +          M1        M1                   Peng Fig.1A, Fig.2G
1   st6gal1     produces  sia26gal         +          M1        M1            Peng Fig.S5 siRNA KD; HGNC
2     mgat5  upregulates  sia26gal         +          M1        M1                      ref 45 Gray 2020
3      cmas     produces  sia26gal         +          M1        M1                         KEGG hsa00512
4        ha        binds  sia26gal         +          M1        M1         Peng Fig.2G (docking), Fig.2H
5  sia26gal     recruits       wsn         +          M1        M2             Peng Fig.2H (tumor entry)
6     caco3      carries       wsn         +          M1        M1                           Peng Fig.2B
7     caco3     consumes   lactate         ±          M5        M1  pH-responsive release (Peng Fig.S5A)
8       wsn    activates    m2_ion         +          M1        M2                     Peng intro ref 30
9       wsn    activates     pb1f2         +          M1        M2                    ref 54 (Wang 2021)

(c) 关联性 — module × module 边密度矩阵¶

# 有多少条边从 module A 跳到 module B？

sns.heatmap(edge_density, annot=True, fmt="d", cmap="YlOrRd", ax=ax, cbar=True)
ax.set_title("module × module 边密度 (# edges)")
ax.set_xlabel("to module")
ax.set_ylabel("from module")
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(13.5, 7))

# (d.1) Geographics: module × side
ms = pd.crosstab(nodes["module"], nodes["side"])
ms.plot(kind="bar", stacked=True, ax=axes[0,0],
        color={"host": "#4a8fba", "therapy": "#d8a259"})
axes[0,0].set_title("Geographics: nodes per module × side")
axes[0,0].set_ylabel("# nodes")
axes[0,0].tick_params(axis="x", rotation=0)
axes[0,0].legend(title="", frameon=False)

# (d.2) Geographics: observable vs not, by module
mo = pd.crosstab(nodes["module"], nodes["observable"])
mo.columns = [{True:"observable", False:"unobservable"}.get(c, c) for c in mo.columns]
mo.plot(kind="bar", stacked=True, ax=axes[0,1],
        color={"observable": "#5fa465", "unobservable": "#c1666b"})
axes[0,1].set_title("observable 节点 per module")
axes[0,1].set_ylabel("# nodes")
axes[0,1].tick_params(axis="x", rotation=0)

# (d.3) 整体分布: node type
vc = nodes["type"].value_counts()
axes[1,0].bar(range(len(vc)), vc.values, color="steelblue")
axes[1,0].set_xticks(range(len(vc)))
axes[1,0].set_xticklabels(vc.index, rotation=35, ha="right", fontsize=9)
axes[1,0].set_title("整体分布: node type")
axes[1,0].set_ylabel("# nodes")

# (d.4) 整体分布: edge relation
vc = edges["relation"].value_counts()
axes[1,1].bar(range(len(vc)), vc.values, color="cadetblue")
axes[1,1].set_xticks(range(len(vc)))
axes[1,1].set_xticklabels(vc.index, rotation=35, ha="right", fontsize=9)
axes[1,1].set_title("整体分布: edge relation (verb)")
axes[1,1].set_ylabel("# edges")

plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

§2 · 数据处理阶段¶

原始数据不能直接进模型。要经过四步处理才能得到最终训练表：

  1. §2.1.1 表达矩阵 → 通路节点对齐（20,530 基因 → 70 个 observable 节点）
  2. §2.1.2 从 6 基因签名构造代理 label
  3. §2.1.3 合并 pathway-aligned expression + 临床关键字段 + 生存终点 + label
  4. §2.1.4 合并后的最终训练表 · shape · head · 复现 Fig.1C 验证

§2.1 · 合并后的数据库信息¶

§2.1.1 · 表达矩阵 → 82 pathway 节点对齐¶

In [46]:
# Aggregate symbols 的候选展开规则（和 bovin_demo.data.gene_mapping 一致）
def candidate_symbols(sym: str) -> list[str]:
    cleaned = sym.replace("|", "/").strip()
    parts = [p.strip() for p in cleaned.split("/") if p.strip()]
    return parts or [sym]

def align_expression_to_nodes(expr: pd.DataFrame, nodes_df: pd.DataFrame):
    observable = nodes_df[nodes_df["observable"]]
    aligned = {}
    hits, misses, aggregates = [], [], {}
    gset = set(expr.columns)
    for _, node in observable.iterrows():
        cands = candidate_symbols(node["symbol"])
        present = [s for s in cands if s in gset]
        if not present:
            misses.append(node["id"])
            aligned[node["id"]] = pd.Series(np.nan, index=expr.index, dtype="float64")
            continue
        if len(present) == 1:
            s = expr[present[0]].astype("float64")
        else:
            s = expr.loc[:, present].mean(axis=1)
        if len(cands) > 1:
            aggregates[node["id"]] = present
        aligned[node["id"]] = s.rename(node["id"]).astype("float64")
        hits.append(node["id"])
    out = pd.DataFrame(aligned, index=expr.index)
    return out, {"hit_rate": len(hits)/len(observable), "n_observable": len(observable),
                 "n_hits": len(hits), "n_misses": len(misses),
                 "misses": misses, "aggregates": aggregates}

path_coad, rpt_coad = align_expression_to_nodes(expr_c, nodes)
path_luad, rpt_luad = align_expression_to_nodes(expr_l, nodes)
print(f"COAD: {expr_c.shape[1]:,} genes → {path_coad.shape[1]} pathway-aligned features")
print(f"      hit_rate = {rpt_coad['hit_rate']:.3f}  ({rpt_coad['n_hits']}/{rpt_coad['n_observable']})")
print(f"LUAD: {expr_l.shape[1]:,} genes → {path_luad.shape[1]} pathway-aligned features")
print(f"      hit_rate = {rpt_luad['hit_rate']:.3f}  ({rpt_luad['n_hits']}/{rpt_luad['n_observable']})")
print(f"      misses = {rpt_coad['misses']}")

COAD: 20,530 genes → 70 pathway-aligned features
      hit_rate = 0.957  (67/70)
LUAD: 20,530 genes → 70 pathway-aligned features
      hit_rate = 0.957  (67/70)
      misses = ['type1_ifn', 'trg_d', 'adgre1']

§2.1.2 · 代理 label 构造¶

In [47]:
POS = ["CALR", "HMGB1", "HSPA1A", "HSP90AA1"]
NEG = ["CD47", "CD24"]

def zscore(s):
    sd = s.std(ddof=0)
    if sd == 0 or np.isnan(sd): return pd.Series(0.0, index=s.index)
    return (s - s.mean()) / sd

def make_label(expr):
    score = pd.Series(0.0, index=expr.index)
    for g in POS:
        if g in expr.columns: score = score + zscore(expr[g])
    for g in NEG:
        if g in expr.columns: score = score - zscore(expr[g])
    label = (score > score.median()).astype(int).rename("icd_label")
    return score.rename("icd_score"), label

score_c, label_c = make_label(expr_c)
score_l, label_l = make_label(expr_l)
print(f"COAD: label positive rate = {label_c.mean():.3f}  (n={len(label_c)})")
print(f"LUAD: label positive rate = {label_l.mean():.3f}  (n={len(label_l)})")

COAD: label positive rate = 0.498  (n=329)
LUAD: label positive rate = 0.500  (n=576)

§2.1.3 · 合并成最终训练表¶

这是 对 BOVIN demo 最重要的一张表。每一行 = 一个 TCGA 样本，它包含：

字段组 来源 列数
node_* pathway-aligned expression (§2.1.1) 70
关键临床变量 clinical matrix (§1.2) 挑选 6
生存终点 survival file (§1.3) 4
label §2.1.2 代理 label 2 (score + binary)
In [48]:
def build_merged(expr, clin, surv, pathway_aligned, score, label, cohort):
    # 只取双方都有的 sample
    common = expr.index.intersection(clin.index)
    if surv is not None:
        common = common.intersection(surv.index)
    clin_cols = [c for c in KEY_CLIN if c in clin.columns]
    surv_cols = ["OS", "OS.time", "PFI", "PFI.time"]
    surv_cols = [c for c in surv_cols if c in surv.columns]

    merged = pd.concat([
        pathway_aligned.loc[common].add_prefix("node_"),
        clin.loc[common, clin_cols],
        surv.loc[common, surv_cols],
        score.loc[common],
        label.loc[common],
    ], axis=1)
    merged["cohort"] = cohort
    return merged

merged_c = build_merged(expr_c, clin_c, surv_c, path_coad, score_c, label_c, "COAD")
merged_l = build_merged(expr_l, clin_l, surv_l, path_luad, score_l, label_l, "LUAD")
print(f"COAD merged shape: {merged_c.shape}")
print(f"LUAD merged shape: {merged_l.shape}")

COAD merged shape: (326, 84)
LUAD merged shape: (576, 82)

§2.1.4 · 合并后的 shape · head(10) · Fig.1C 验证¶

In [49]:
# Column composition summary
def composition(df):
    node_cols = [c for c in df.columns if c.startswith("node_")]
    clin_cols = [c for c in KEY_CLIN if c in df.columns]
    surv_cols = [c for c in ["OS", "OS.time", "PFI", "PFI.time"] if c in df.columns]
    return {
        "total_rows": df.shape[0],
        "total_cols": df.shape[1],
        "pathway node_* cols": len(node_cols),
        "clinical cols": len(clin_cols),
        "survival cols": len(surv_cols),
        "label cols": sum(c in df.columns for c in ["icd_score", "icd_label"]),
        "cohort col": sum(c in df.columns for c in ["cohort"]),
        "memory": df_memory_mb(df),
    }

pd.DataFrame([composition(merged_c), composition(merged_l)],
             index=["COAD", "LUAD"]).T

In [51]:
# 验证: 在合并后的 DataFrame 上复现 Peng Fig.1C (CRT 四分位 PFI KM)
def logrank(t_hi, e_hi, t_lo, e_lo):
    ta, ea = np.asarray(t_hi, float), np.asarray(e_hi, int)
    tb, eb = np.asarray(t_lo, float), np.asarray(e_lo, int)
    evs = np.sort(np.unique(np.concatenate([ta[ea==1], tb[eb==1]])))
    obs = exp = var = 0.0
    for t in evs:
        na, nb = (ta >= t).sum(), (tb >= t).sum(); n = na + nb
        if n == 0: continue
        da, db = ((ta==t)&(ea==1)).sum(), ((tb==t)&(eb==1)).sum(); d = da + db
        if d == 0: continue
        obs += da; exp += na*d/n
        if n > 1: var += (na*nb*d*(n-d))/(n**2*(n-1))
    if var == 0: return 1.0
    z2 = (obs-exp)**2/var
    return float(chi2.sf(z2, 1))

def km_curve(t, e):
    o = np.argsort(t); t, e = np.asarray(t)[o], np.asarray(e)[o]
    s = [1.0]; xs = [0.0]; n = len(t)
    for i in range(n):
        if e[i] == 1:
            s.append(s[-1]*(n-i-1)/(n-i)); xs.append(t[i])
    return np.array(xs), np.array(s)

crt = merged_c["node_crt"].astype(float)  # 'crt' is the node_id for CALR in the pathway graph
q25, q75 = crt.quantile([0.25, 0.75])
hi = merged_c.index[crt >= q75]
lo = merged_c.index[crt <= q25]
df_hi = merged_c.loc[hi, ["PFI", "PFI.time"]].dropna()
df_lo = merged_c.loc[lo, ["PFI", "PFI.time"]].dropna()
p = logrank(df_hi["PFI.time"], df_hi["PFI"].astype(int),
            df_lo["PFI.time"], df_lo["PFI"].astype(int))

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(6, 4))
for sub, col, lbl in [(df_hi, "crimson",   f"CRT high (Q4, n={len(df_hi)})"),
                      (df_lo, "steelblue", f"CRT low  (Q1, n={len(df_lo)})")]:
    xs, ys = km_curve(sub["PFI.time"].values, sub["PFI"].astype(int).values)
    ax.step(xs, ys, where="post", color=col, lw=2, label=lbl)
ax.set_xlabel("PFI.time (days)")
ax.set_ylabel("PFI probability")
ax.set_ylim(-0.02, 1.02)
ax.legend(loc="lower left", fontsize=9)
ax.set_title(f"最终训练表上复现 Peng Fig.1C · log-rank p = {p:.4f}")
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

print(f"→ 在合并后的 DataFrame (COAD) 上：log-rank p = {p:.5f}")
print("   Peng Fig.1C 报 p = 0.003024，方向和量级一致 → 合并 pipeline 没有破坏原始信号")
